text.message: On a insane losing streak, wouldn’t pick any numbers that I do, they won’t roll
if you do go 4 6 3, I'm happy to do some wood for wheat
the losing streak makes sense haha
If I saw your message I would have gone 6-4-3
Have lost 100 rating in a few days lol
Insane haha played a game earlier with matched 8s and they rolled 5 times out of 70
Also insane to rob me instead of the guy tied with 2 devs
Black could get army for 9 and vp for ten
Ya so maybe you should have robbed them
